ride-on.name: Ride On
ride-on.text: Action: During a conflict, choose a Cavalry character you control. Select one - either move that character to the conflict or move it home.

versions.flavor: "Why would we settle down like some indulgent Bayushi, when we draw strength from our unique freedom?" - Moto Rurame

spyglass.name: Spyglass
spyglass.text: Reaction: After attached character commits to a conflict or moves to a conflict – draw 1 card. (Limit twice per round.)

i-am-ready.name: I Am Ready
i-am-ready.text: Action: Remove 1 fate from a (friendly) [clan-unicorn] character – ready that character.

moto-youth.name: Moto Youth
moto-youth.text: This character gets +1[conflict-military] during the first [conflict-military] conflict each round.

versions.flavor: Strike your enemies with such speed they cannot think to strike back.

ornate-fan.name: Ornate Fan
ornate-fan.text: Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.)

versions.flavor: At times, the ornamentation is the point. At others, it is merely a distraction.

“There is another kind of artist, who sets more soberly about his work, striving to give real beauty to the things which men actually use and to give to them the shape which tradition has ordained.” 
— Murasaki Shikibu

pilgrimage.name: Pilgrimage
pilgrimage.text: During conflicts at this province, cancel all ring effects. (If this province breaks, resolve ring effects as normal.)

versions.flavor:
“Faith is the greatest armor. The Seppun understand this as they guard the Empress — and as they brave the mountain's elemental trials.”
— Teachings of the Imperial Guard

born-in-war.name: Born in War
born-in-war.text: Cavalry character only. X is equal to the number of unclaimed rings.

fine-katana.name: Fine Katana
fine-katana.text: Restricted. (No more than two restricted attachments per character.)

versions.flavor:
Immortal steel waits
Venerated divine blade
The fires of the soul

“Just as a horse must have endurance and no defects, so it is with weapons. Horses should walk strongly, and swords and companion swords should cut strongly.”
— Miyamoto Musashi
Ride to the horizon and back again. Only then can you begin to comprehend the Unicorn.

curved-blade.name: Curved Blade
curved-blade.text:
Attach to a [clan-unicorn] character. Restricted.
While attached character is attacking, it gets an additional +2[conflict-military].

moto-stables.name: Moto Stables
moto-stables.text: Reaction: After a character you control moves to a conflict - it gets +2[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict. (Limit twice per round.)

shinjo-gunso.name: Shinjo Gunsō
shinjo-gunso.text: Reaction: After you play this character from your provinces - look at the top 5 cards of your dynasty deck. You may put a character with cost 2 or lower from among those cards into play. Discard the rest.

versions.flavor: "March divided. Attack united." - from the tactics of Shinjo Khulan Khan

shinjo-shono.name: Shinjo Shono
shinjo-shono.text: Pride. Action: While this character is participating in a conflict, if you control more participating characters than your opponent – each participating Cavalry character you control gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict.

ujik-tactics.name: Ujik Tactics
ujik-tactics.text: Action: During a conflict - each non-unique character you control gets +1[conflict-military] until the end of the conflict.

versions.flavor: It was only by adopting the tactics of their assailants that the Ki-Rin Clan survived their journey across the Plain of Wind and Stone.

warrior-poet.name: Warrior Poet
warrior-poet.text: Action: While this character is participating in a conflict – each participating character controlled by your opponent gets –1[conflict-military] and –1[conflict-political] until the end of the conflict.

assassination.name: Assassination
assassination.text: Conflict Action: Lose 3 honor. Choose a character with printed cost 2 or lower – discard that character. (Max 1 per round.)

versions.flavor: Steel whispered through silk and flesh. In the morning, they would find the body and speak of shadows and dishonor — but tonight, the deed was done.

moto-outrider.name: Moto Outrider
moto-outrider.text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which this character is participating - ready this character.

versions.flavor: Lands won on horseback ought to be ruled from horseback.

seeker-of-air.name: Seeker of Air
seeker-of-air.text: You may replace 1 province of any element with an additional [element-air] province while deckbuilding. Reaction: After an [element-air] province you control is revealed – gain 1 fate.

shiksha-scout.name: Shiksha Scout
shiksha-scout.text: While this character is participating in a conflict, you are considered to control an additional character in this conflict.

versions.flavor: "We have seen much that is strange from the world. That our allies might be called strange is merely a compliment." - Shinjo Altansarnai

shinjo-saddle.name: Shinjo Saddle
shinjo-saddle.text: Cavalry character only. Action: Choose a Cavalry character you control – attach this card to that character.

versions.flavor: Among the Unicorn, one inherits more than just a daishō.

spoils-of-war.name: Spoils of War
spoils-of-war.text: Reaction: After you win a [conflict-military] as the attacker - draw 3 cards. Then, choose and discard 1 card from your hand. (Max 1 per conflict.)

versions.flavor: "It would be a shame to leave such craftsmanship to rust."

young-warrior.name: Young Warrior
young-warrior.text: This character must be declared as an attacker or defender in the first conflict declared each round.

versions.flavor: Utaku women prove early on whether they have the strength and dedication to join the venerated ranks of the shiotome.

adorned-barcha.name: Adorned Barcha
adorned-barcha.text: Attach to a unique character you control. Limited. Restricted. Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which attached character is not participating, choose a participating character - bow that character and move attached character to the conflict.

elemental-fury.name: Elemental Fury
elemental-fury.text: Reaction: After this province is revealed – switch the contested ring with an unclaimed ring. (The conflict retains its type.)

versions.flavor: "Inari-no-Kami smiles upon these lands." - Aiko, priestess of Inari
“The fortunes blessed these lands, but it takes honest work to harvest them.”
On the distant Plain of Wind and Stone, Shinjo's followers learned new gaijin ways to ride, to hunt and to fight from horseback.

twilight-rider.name: Twilight Rider
twilight-rider.text: Rally. (After this card is revealed in a province, add the top card of your dynasty deck to the province, faceup.) Reaction: After this character moves to a conflict, choose a character – ready that character.

utaku-infantry.name: Utaku Infantry
utaku-infantry.text: While this character is participating in a conflict, it gets +1[conflict-military] and +1[conflict-political] for each participating [clan-unicorn] character you control.

versions.flavor: Forbidden to ride in battle, Utaku men are like the high banks of the river; their sisters are the current, swift and unstoppable.

ancestral-lands.name: Ancestral Lands
ancestral-lands.text: This province gets +5 strength during [conflict-political] conflicts.

versions.flavor: "Our claim on these lands stretches back to the dawn of the Empire."
“We cannot know if the sun has set forever on the Emerald Empire, but its remembered glory will shine through our long nights of exile.”

flank-the-enemy.name: Flank the Enemy
flank-the-enemy.text: Action: During a conflict in which you control more participating characters than your opponent, your opponent chooses a participating character they control - bow that character.

shinjo-yasamura.name: Shinjo Yasamura
shinjo-yasamura.text: Covert. (When this character attacks, choose one character without covert. That character cannot be declared as a defender.)Reaction: After this character evades a character using covert - that character cannot be declared as a defender this phase.

captive-audience.name: Captive Audience
captive-audience.text: Action: During a [conflict-political] conflict, lose 1 honor – change the conflict type to [conflict-military].

versions.flavor: "Now you must heed our demands!"

cavalry-reserves.name: Cavalry Reserves
cavalry-reserves.text: [conflict-military] Conflict Action: Choose up to 6 printed cost worth of Cavalry characters in your dynasty discard pile - put those characters into play in the conflict.

versions.flavor: When the children of the five winds unite, who can ride out the coming storm?

iuchi-soulweaver.name: Iuchi Soulweaver
iuchi-soulweaver.text: Dire - This character is considered to be participating in each conflict in which you control at least 1 other participating character. It does not bow as a result of conflict resolution in conflicts in which it is at home. (This character is dire when it has no fate on it.)

outskirts-sentry.name: Outskirts Sentry
outskirts-sentry.text: Reaction: After a character is moved to the conflict in which this character is participating, choose a participating character - honor that character.

worldly-shiotome.name: Worldly Shiotome
worldly-shiotome.text: Reaction: After you play a Gaijin card - honor this character. Card design by Legend of the Five Rings community.

utaku-battle-steed.name: Utaku Battle Steed
utaku-battle-steed.text: Attach to a [clan-unicorn] character. Attached character gains the Cavalry trait. Reaction: After attached character wins a [conflict-military] conflict - honor attached character.

seal-of-the-unicorn.name: Seal of the Unicorn
seal-of-the-unicorn.text: Attached character gains the [clan-unicorn] clan symbol and the Cavalry trait.

versions.flavor:
In the name of Lady Shinjo Altansarnai,
Seeker of the Setting Sun,
Khan of Khans,
Mistress of the Five Winds,
Daimyō of the Shinjo, and
Champion of the Unicorn Clan

shinomen-wayfinders.name: Shinomen Wayfinders
shinomen-wayfinders.text: No attachments except Weapon. During a conflict, reduce the cost to play this character by 1 for each participating [clan-unicorn] character you control.

versions.flavor: "There are strange creatures that lie within Shinomen that are... unlikely to greet us as friends. Stay on your guard." - Shinjo Tatsuo

shiotome-encampment.name: Shiotome Encampment
shiotome-encampment.text: Action: If you have a [conflict-military] ring in your claimed ring pool, choose a Cavalry character – ready that character.

versions.flavor: "We need not mar the purity of our intentions with mere words."

higashi-kaze-company.name: Higashi Kaze Company
higashi-kaze-company.text: No attachments except Weapon. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict, choose another participating character with no fate on it - that character does not bow as the result of this conflict's resolution.

minami-kaze-regulars.name: Minami Kaze Regulars
minami-kaze-regulars.text: No attachments except Weapon. Reaction: After this character wins a conflict in which you have more participating characters than your opponent – gain 1 fate and draw 1 card.

shinjo-altansarnai-2.name: Shinjo Altansarnai
shinjo-altansarnai-2.text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict in which this character is participating - search the top 8 cards of your dynasty deck for a non-unique character with printed cost 3 or lower and put that character into play in the conflict. Shuffle.

versions.flavor: "We shall fight together."

battle-maiden-recruit.name: Battle Maiden Recruit
battle-maiden-recruit.text: This character gets +2[conflict-military] while you have claimed the [element-water] or [element-void] ring.

golden-plains-outpost.name: Golden Plains Outpost
golden-plains-outpost.text: Action: During a [conflict-military] conflict, bow this stronghold. Choose a Cavalry character you control – move it to that conflict.

meditations-on-the-tao.name: Meditations on the Tao
meditations-on-the-tao.text: Conflict Action: Choose an attacking character – remove 1 fate from that character.

versions.flavor: "Appreciation of beauty is the beginning of wisdom." - Tao of Shinsei

"The motion of the Tao is the return
The way of the Tao is yielding
All things under the Sky come from existence
All that exists comes out of Nothing"
— Laozi

challenge-on-the-fields.name: Challenge on the Fields
challenge-on-the-fields.text: Action: During a conflict, initiate a [conflict-military] duel - resolve the duel, giving each dueling character +1[conflict-military] for each other participating character controlled by the same player until the end of the duel. Move the duel's loser home.

versions.flavor: "Face me, Shono! Fight me now!" - Matsu Mitsuko
